text.title: Growth Social Media Strategy Worked Example
text.summary: One end-to-end worked example showing the path from preconditions to a valid spec artefact.

example.title: Happy-path spec artefact
example.description: Solo operators spread across five platforms with zero compounding traction — needs the discipline pivot from 'be everywhere' to 'one atomization loop'. An operator with all prerequisites in place runs the methodology; outcome is a validated spec matching the output contract.
example.trace: Inputs satisfied → decision-tree run branch fires → rule r1-two-platforms-max drives the artefact shape → self-check PASS → validator exit 0 → returned to caller.
